color.$description: CivUI dark mode palette — WCAG AA accessible on dark backgrounds

darkest.$description: Brightest pale blue — mirrors light-mode `darkest` semantic role (deepest text) inverted for dark-bg readability. Added 2026-05-29 for ladder alignment

lightest.$description: Softest dark red bg — consumed by alert / badge / count / card / form-error-summary recipes. Mirrors warning/success/info's lightest role.

lighter.$description: Mid-darker red — stronger soft bg between lightest and light. Used by danger-button hover step (rest=lightest, hover=lighter, active=light). Tuned to clear AAA against `error.darkest` text in dark mode.

darker.$description: Between `dark` and `darkest` — added 2026-05-29 for ladder alignment, inverted (brighter) for dark-bg readability

darkest.$description: Brightest pale red — mirrors light-mode `darkest` semantic role (deepest text), inverted for dark-bg readability

lightest.$description: Softest dark amber bg (was `lighter` before the 2026-05-27 restructure)

lighter.$description: Mid-darker gold — stronger soft bg between lightest and light. Tuned to clear AA against `warning.darkest` text in dark mode.

darker.$description: Between `dark` and `darkest` — added 2026-05-29 for ladder alignment, inverted (brighter) for dark-bg readability

darkest.$description: Brightest pale amber — distinct from `light`, brighter than `dark`. Mirrors light-mode `darkest` semantic role (deepest text on bg) inverted for dark-bg readability

lightest.$description: Softest dark green bg (was `lighter` before the 2026-05-27 restructure)

lighter.$description: Mid-darker green — stronger soft bg between lightest and light. Tuned to clear AA against `success.darkest` text in dark mode.

darker.$description: Between `dark` and `darkest` — added 2026-05-29 for ladder alignment, inverted (brighter) for dark-bg readability

darkest.$description: Brightest pale green — distinct from `light`, brighter than `dark`. Mirrors light-mode `darkest` semantic role (deepest text on bg) inverted for dark-bg readability

lightest.$description: Softest dark cyan bg (was `lighter` before the 2026-05-27 restructure)

lighter.$description: Mid-darker teal — stronger soft bg between lightest and light. Tuned to clear AA against `info.darkest` text in dark mode.

darker.$description: Between `dark` and `darkest` — added 2026-05-29 for ladder alignment, inverted (brighter) for dark-bg readability

darkest.$description: Brightest pale cyan — distinct from `light`, brighter than `dark`. Mirrors light-mode `darkest` semantic role (deepest text on bg) inverted for dark-bg readability

tag.$description: Tag primary variants — vivid backgrounds with dark text for dark mode
